layout.footer: © 2026 AI Video Frame. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Intelligent framing for your videos.
hero.subtitle: Let AI automatically crop landscape videos to vertical formats. Perfect for TikTok, Reels and Shorts.

payg.title: Pay as you go
payg.overageNote: Videos longer than 5 min cost +1 credit per additional minute.

pricing.footnote: *1 credit covers the first 5 minutes of a video. Each additional minute (or part thereof) costs 1 additional credit.

api.title: Build with our API
api.subtitle: Integrate AI video reframing directly into your own app. Subscribe and get your API key on RapidAPI.

contact.title: Have questions or feedback?
contact.subtitle: We're always looking to improve. Reach out if you have any feature requests, found a bug, or just want to say hi!

quantityDialog.title: Select Quantity
quantityDialog.subtitle: Pay as you go credits
quantityDialog.label: How many credits do you need?

toasts.activeSubscriptionDesc: You already have an active subscription. Please manage it through the 'Manage Subscription' portal if you wish to change your plan.
toasts.creditsSimulatedDesc: Your credit balance has been updated.

processing.title: Processing your video
processing.subtitle: Our AI is tracking subjects and auto-framing to {{ratio}}.

processing.progressNote_finalizing: Merging audio and saving files. Almost there!

completed.title: Your video is ready!
completed.subtitle: Auto-framed to {{ratio}} with AI subject tracking.

failed.title: Processing failed
failed.subtitle: Something went wrong. Please try again.

signIn.title: Sign in to get started
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to upload and process videos.
signIn.highlight: Your first video is on us!

dropzone.title: Upload your video
dropzone.subtitle: Drag and drop your file here, or click to browse. MP4, MOV, or AVI up to 2GB.

filePreview.analyzingNote: Please wait while we analyze the video on our server...

toasts.processingStartedDesc: Your video is being auto-framed. This may take a few minutes.
